creator: squat@squat.no
text:
http://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/2c4f4688-298b-11dc-a197-0011098b2f36.html reports that typespeed versions up to 4.1.0 is affected of the given arbitary code execution. This version number is wrong, the correct one is 0.4.1. The newst version of typespeed is 0.6.2, which will say that there's a couple of years left before version 4.1.0 will be released. I don't know if this is the correct way to report this, please excuse me if I'm wrong.

Fix: 

Update the version number in the vuxml-entry, from 4.1.0 to 0.4.1
